title: Projectile Camera
description: A simple client-sided mod that allow you to see the projectile POV
body:
# Projectile Camera Mod
A simple client-sided mod that allow you to see the projectile POV

## Features
- Support third-person and first-person
- Smooth camera tracking
- Allow you to change which projectile to follow
- Keybind to toggle the mod
- Customizable

![Arrow Camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8E8FHH0P/images/8e7441f0477f7de18ddaa8013bafe83acbb234a3.png)
